  1420→    Private Sub PLC_READ()
  1421→
  1422→        Dim i As Integer
  1423→        Dim j As Integer
  1424→        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
  1425→        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
  1426→        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
  1427→        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
  1428→        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
  1429→        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
  1430→        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24
  1431→
  1432→        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
  1433→        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)
  1434→
  1435→        szDeviceName = "D4200" & vbLf &
  1436→                                "D4201" & vbLf &
  1437→                                "D4202" & vbLf &
  1438→                                "D4203" & vbLf &
  1439→                                "D4204" & vbLf &
  1440→                                "D4205" & vbLf &
  1441→                                "D4206" & vbLf &
  1442→                                "D4207" & vbLf &
  1443→                                "D4208" & vbLf &
  1444→                                "D4209" & vbLf &
  1445→                                "D4210" & vbLf &
  1446→                                "D4211" & vbLf &
  1447→                                "D4250" & vbLf &
  1448→                                "D4251" & vbLf &
  1449→                                "D4252" & vbLf &
  1450→                                "D4253" & vbLf &
  1451→                                "D4254" & vbLf &
  1452→                                "D4255" & vbLf &
  1453→                                "D4256" & vbLf &
  1454→                                "D4257" & vbLf &
  1455→                                "D4258" & vbLf &
  1456→                                "D4259" & vbLf &
  1457→                                "D4260" & vbLf &
  1458→                                "D4261"
  1459→        Try
  1460→            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
  1461→        Catch exException As Exception
  1462→            'Exception processing
  1463→            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
  1464→            Exit Sub
  1465→        End Try
  1466→
  1467→        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
  1468→        If iReturnCode = 0 Then
  1469→
  1470→            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
  1471→            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
  1472→                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
  1473→            Next iNumber
  1474→            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
  1475→                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
  1476→            Next i
  1477→
  1478→            For j = 0 To 11
  1479→                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
  1480→                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
  1481→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
  1482→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
  1483→                Else
  1484→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
  1485→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
  1486→                End If
  1487→            Next
  1488→            For j = 0 To 11
  1489→                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
  1490→                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
  1491→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
  1492→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
  1493→                Else
  1494→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
  1495→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
  1496→                End If
  1497→            Next
  1498→
  1499→            tError1 = "OK"
  1500→
  1501→        Else
  1502→
  1503→            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)
  1504→
  1505→        End If
  1506→
  1507→    End Sub

  1764→    Private Sub btnFProof_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles btnFProof.Click
  1765→        ' 마스터 패스워드 확인 (날짜*2)
  1766→        Dim today As String = DateTime.Now.ToString("yyyyMMdd")
  1767→        Dim masterPw As Long = CLng(today) * 2
  1768→
  1769→        ' 패스워드 입력 다이얼로그 (* 마스킹)
  1770→        Dim dlg As New Form()
  1771→        Dim txt As New TextBox()
  1772→        Dim okBtn As New Button()
  1773→        dlg.Text = "F/PROOF 설정"
  1774→        dlg.FormBorderStyle = FormBorderStyle.FixedDialog
  1775→        dlg.MaximizeBox = False
  1776→        dlg.MinimizeBox = False
  1777→        dlg.StartPosition = FormStartPosition.CenterParent
  1778→        dlg.ClientSize = New Size(300, 100)
  1779→        Dim lbl As New Label()
  1780→        lbl.Text = "비밀번호를 입력하세요."
  1781→        lbl.Location = New Point(10, 10)
  1782→        lbl.AutoSize = True
  1783→        txt.Location = New Point(10, 35)
  1784→        txt.Size = New Size(270, 25)
  1785→        txt.PasswordChar = "*"c
  1786→        okBtn.Text = "확인"
  1787→        okBtn.Location = New Point(100, 65)
  1788→        okBtn.Size = New Size(80, 28)
  1789→        okBtn.DialogResult = DialogResult.OK
  1790→        dlg.AcceptButton = okBtn
  1791→        dlg.Controls.AddRange(New Control() {lbl, txt, okBtn})
  1792→        If dlg.ShowDialog() <> DialogResult.OK OrElse String.IsNullOrEmpty(txt.Text) Then Return
  1793→        Dim input As String = txt.Text
  1794→
  1795→        If input = masterPw.ToString() OrElse input = "1793" Then
  1796→            Dim frm As New FrmFProof()

   661→    Private Function OptionConvert(str As String) As String
   662→
   663→        Dim tmp As String
   664→
   665→        If str = "ON" Then
   666→            tmp = ""
   667→        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
   668→            tmp = ""
   669→        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
   670→            tmp = "PASS"
   671→        End If
   672→
   673→        Return tmp
   674→
   675→    End Function
   676→
   677→    Private Function OptionConvertInt(str As String) As Integer
   678→
   679→        Dim tmp As Integer
   680→
   681→        If str = "ON" Then
   682→            tmp = 1
   683→        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
   684→            tmp = 0
   685→        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
   686→            tmp = 100
   687→        End If
   688→
   689→        Return tmp
   690→
   691→    End Function

  1065→    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String
  1066→
  1067→        Dim tmp As String = ""
  1068→        Dim i As Integer
  1069→
  1070→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
  1071→            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
  1072→        Next
  1073→
  1074→        Return tmp
  1075→
  1076→    End Function

  1078→    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String
  1079→
  1080→        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
  1081→        Dim i As Integer
  1082→
  1083→        retVal = ""
  1084→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
  1085→            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
  1086→            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
  1087→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
  1088→                i = i + 1
  1089→            Else
  1090→                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
  1091→                i = i + 3
  1092→            End If
  1093→            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
  1094→        Next
  1095→        Return retVal
  1096→
  1097→    End Function

  1270→    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

  1280→                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
  1281→                        Serial_RFID1.DiscardInBuffer()
  1282→
  1283→                        '02 02 09 07 E0040 181D1 687B0 3 ' 8 + 16
  1284→                        If sRecvData.Length = 24 Then

  1286→                                Dim tagId As String = Mid(sRecvData, 9, 16)

  1288→                                RFID_TAG_ID1 = tagId

  1292→                        Else
  1293→                            Label_RF_READ1.Text = "Empty"
  1294→                        End If
  1295→                        sRecvData = ""
  1296→                    End If
  1297→                End If
  1298→            Catch ex As Exception
  1299→                sRecvData = ""
  1300→                Serial_RFID1.DiscardInBuffer()

  1400→    Private Sub PLC_READ()
  1401→
  1402→        Dim i As Integer
  1403→        Dim j As Integer
  1404→        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
  1405→        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
  1406→        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
  1407→        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
  1408→        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
  1409→        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
  1410→        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24
  1411→
  1412→        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
  1413→        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)
  1414→
  1415→        szDeviceName = "D4400" & vbLf &
  1416→                                "D4401" & vbLf &
  1417→                                "D4402" & vbLf &
  1418→                                "D4403" & vbLf &
  1419→                                "D4404" & vbLf &
  1420→                                "D4405" & vbLf &
  1421→                                "D4406" & vbLf &
  1422→                                "D4407" & vbLf &
  1423→                                "D4408" & vbLf &
  1424→                                "D4409" & vbLf &
  1425→                                "D4410" & vbLf &
  1426→                                "D4411" & vbLf &
  1427→                                "D4450" & vbLf &
  1428→                                "D4451" & vbLf &
  1429→                                "D4452" & vbLf &
  1430→                                "D4453" & vbLf &
  1431→                                "D4454" & vbLf &
  1432→                                "D4455" & vbLf &
  1433→                                "D4456" & vbLf &
  1434→                                "D4457" & vbLf &
  1435→                                "D4458" & vbLf &
  1436→                                "D4459" & vbLf &
  1437→                                "D4460" & vbLf &
  1438→                                "D4461"
  1439→        Try
  1440→            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
  1441→        Catch exException As Exception
  1442→            'Exception processing
  1443→            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
  1444→            Exit Sub
  1445→        End Try
  1446→
  1447→        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
  1448→        If iReturnCode = 0 Then
  1449→
  1450→            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
  1451→            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
  1452→                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
  1453→            Next iNumber
  1454→            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
  1455→                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
  1456→            Next i
  1457→
  1458→            For j = 0 To 11
  1459→                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
  1460→                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
  1461→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
  1462→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
  1463→                Else
  1464→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
  1465→                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
  1466→                End If
  1467→            Next
  1468→            For j = 0 To 11
  1469→                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
  1470→                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
  1471→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
  1472→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
  1473→                Else
  1474→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
  1475→                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
  1476→                End If
  1477→            Next
  1478→
  1479→            tError1 = "OK"
  1480→
  1481→        Else
  1482→
  1483→            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)
  1484→
  1485→        End If
  1486→
  1487→    End Sub
